leadText: Mighty Cleave (Japanese: パワフルエッジ Powerful Edge) is a damage-dealing Rock-type move introduced during Generation IX, in The Indigo Disk. It is the signature move of Iron Boulder.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Mighty Cleave inflicts damage. It bypasses the effects of Protect , Detect , Spiky Shield , King's Shield , Baneful Bunker , Silk Trap , and Burning Bulwark , but does not lift the effects of these moves. If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.
